nasb.text: The sons of Israel did things secretly which were not right against the Lord their God. Moreover, they built for themselves high places in all their towns, from watchtower to fortified city.

esv.text: And the people of Israel did secretly against the Lord their God things that were not right. They built for themselves high places in all their towns, from watchtower to fortified city.

cnv.text: 以色列人暗中做了不對的事，違背耶和華他們的　神，並且在他們所有的城市，從哨站到設防城，為他們自己建築邱壇。

ccb.text: 以色列人暗中做不义之事，冒犯他们的上帝耶和华。从瞭望塔到坚城，他们在各地建丘坛，
